positive: A minimalist, abstract design featuring a stylized celestial gradient wave structure, composed of interlocking geometric cosmic elements like rings, crescent moons, and stylized comet trails. The color palette is rich indigo, soft lavender, and metallic gold accents, set against a deep, velvety midnight blue background. The composition should be centered, utilizing negative space effectively to create a clean, wearable silhouette suitable for apparel printing. High contrast, vector-like crisp edges, ethereal glow, digital illustration, symmetry, sacred geometry style, vibrant and calming.
